steps.t: Angârmu has asked you to check for his camel, Ishegir, at his first favourte spot to the west, past the big rock.
Use the <rgb=#00FF00>look</rgb> emote to check for signs of Ishegir at his first favourite spot near big rock to the west of which Angârmu…
There was no sign of Ishegir at his first favourite spot. He may be at his second favourite spot near the river's edge to the east.
Use the <rgb=#00FF00>look</rgb> emote to check for signs of Ishegir at this location.
There was no sign of Ishegir at his second favourite spot. Perhaps you will find him at his third favourite spot that Angârmu told you of, near the Po…
Use the <rgb=#00FF00>look</rgb> emote to check for signs of Ishegir at this location.
Return to Angârmu with news of Ishegir after having checked all of his favourite spots he had suggested.
